mapper.select: SELECT tr.trans_id, de.* FROM db_sport_transfer_record tr INNER JOIN db_sport_transfer_record_detail de ON de.bet_id = tr.bet_id where tr.venue_code = 'DB_PANDA_SPORT' AND tr.venue_code = de.venue_code AND tr.order_status = de.order_status AND tr.transfer_type = de.transfer_type AND tr.amount = de.amount and de.type = 0 AND tr.amount > 0 AND de.settle_count < 3 -- 当前时间 大于 created_time + 3分钟 且 小于 created_time + 1小时 AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000 > tr.created_time + 3 * 60 * 1000 AND UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000 < tr.created_time + 60 * 60 * 1000 LIMIT 100;
